page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr8i.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 6462C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The instance is configured with 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs, meaning hyperthreading is disabled with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per physical core.

This instance does not include any local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring reliance on external block storage options for data persistence. Network connectivity is supported by an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention from other tenants on the host. However, the lack of integrated local storage and GPU accelerators limits its utility for workloads requiring high-speed local caching or hardware-accelerated parallel processing.

Given the 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.hfr8i.2xlarge is classified as a memory-optimized instance. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that demand substantial memory capacity relative to compute resources, such as medium-sized in-memory databases, caching layers, enterprise applications, and memory-intensive data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr8i.2xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. Powered by an Intel Xeon 6462C processor operating at 3.3 GHz, it delivers 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs with hyperthreading disabled. The instance features 64.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage, and provides an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. With dedicated CPU allocation and a high memory-to-vCPU ratio, this instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory databases, caching layers, and data processing tasks that require consistent compute performance without resource sharing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr8i.2xlarge is a memory-optimized KVM instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 6462C cores at 3.3 GHz, 64 GB RAM, and 8 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for memory-intensive workloads.

tagline: A dedicated Intel-powered instance featuring a high memory-to-core ratio and consistent compute performance for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
